title: Glyptostrobus aquaticus
taxonomy: Glyptostrobus aquaticus is a species of coniferous tree that belongs to the family Taxodiaceae. This family is part of the larger order Cupressales and is closely related to other coniferous trees. More broadly, Glyptostrobus aquaticus falls within the division Pinophyta, which includes all coniferous plants. Additionally, it is classified as a member of the class Pinopsida, which is a group of seed plants that produce cones. The classification of Glyptostrobus aquaticus reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the plant kingdom.
